'''âb-s-j''' ('''basaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imbrown|imbrown]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-s-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imbrown|imbrown]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-s-j
|-
! Lemma
| basaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:basajithi|basajithi]] || [[word:basajiji|basajiji]] || [[word:basajishi|basajishi]] || [[word:basaji|basaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:basajuthuth|basajuthuth]] || [[word:basajujuj|basajujuj]] || [[word:basajushush|basajushush]] || [[word:basaj|basaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:basajuthu|basajuthu]] || [[word:basajuju|basajuju]] || [[word:basajushu|basajushu]] || [[word:basaju|basaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:basajufuth|basajufuth]] || [[word:basajufuj|basajufuj]] || [[word:basajufush|basajufush]] || [[word:basajuf|basajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:basajethe|basajethe]] || [[word:basajeje|basajeje]] || [[word:basajeshe|basajeshe]] || [[word:basaje|basaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:basajothoth|basajothoth]] || [[word:basajojoj|basajojoj]] || [[word:basajoshosh|basajoshosh]] || [[word:basaj|basaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:basajotho|basajotho]] || [[word:basajojo|basajojo]] || [[word:basajosho|basajosho]] || [[word:basajo|basajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:basajofoth|basajofoth]] || [[word:basajofoj|basajofoj]] || [[word:basajofosh|basajofosh]] || [[word:basajof|basajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:basajĂŠthĂŠ|basajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:basajĂŠjĂŠ|basajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:basajĂŠshĂŠ|basajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:basajĂŠ|basajĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:basajathath|basajathath]] || [[word:basajajaj|basajajaj]] || [[word:basajashash|basajashash]] || [[word:basaj|basaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:basajatha|basajatha]] || [[word:basajaja|basajaja]] || [[word:basajasha|basajasha]] || [[word:basaja|basaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:basajafath|basajafath]] || [[word:basajafaj|basajafaj]] || [[word:basajafash|basajafash]] || [[word:basajaf|basajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:basajasha|basajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobasajasha|gobasajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibasajasha|gokibasajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:basajnĂŒsha|basajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobasajnknĂŒsha|gobasajnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibasajnĂŒsha|gokibasajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:basajshĂ«sha|basajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobasajnkshĂ«sha|gobasajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibasajshĂ«sha|gokibasajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:basajrosha|basajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobasajnkrosha|gobasajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibasajrosha|gokibasajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:basajmusha|basajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobasajnkmusha|gobasajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibasajmusha|gokibasajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:basajsherasha|basajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobasajnksherasha|gobasajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibasajsherasha|gokibasajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:basajngasha|basajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobasajnkngasha|gobasajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibasajngasha|gokibasajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:basajyasha|basajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobasajnkyasha|gobasajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibasajyasha|gokibasajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:basajyamasha|basajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobasajnkyamasha|gobasajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibasajyamasha|gokibasajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:basajnĂŒshĂ«sha|basajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobasajnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gobasajnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibasajnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokibasajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:basajnĂŒrosha|basajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobasajnknĂŒrosha|gobasajnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibasajnĂŒrosha|gokibasajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:basajnĂŒmusha|basajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobasajnknĂŒmusha|gobasajnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibasajnĂŒmusha|gokibasajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:basajshĂ«nĂŒsha|basajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobasajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gobasajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibasajshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokibasajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:basajshĂ«rosha|basajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobasajnkshĂ«rosha|gobasajnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibasajshĂ«rosha|gokibasajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:basajshĂ«musha|basajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobasajnkshĂ«musha|gobasajnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibasajshĂ«musha|gokibasajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:basajronĂŒsha|basajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobasajnkronĂŒsha|gobasajnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibasajronĂŒsha|gokibasajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:basajroshĂ«sha|basajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobasajnkroshĂ«sha|gobasajnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibasajroshĂ«sha|gokibasajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:basajromusha|basajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobasajnkromusha|gobasajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibasajromusha|gokibasajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:basajmunĂŒsha|basajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobasajnkmunĂŒsha|gobasajnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibasajmunĂŒsha|gokibasajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:basajmushĂ«sha|basajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobasajnkmushĂ«sha|gobasajnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibasajmushĂ«sha|gokibasajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:basajmurosha|basajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobasajnkmurosha|gobasajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibasajmurosha|gokibasajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:basaj|basaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:bĂŠsĂŠj|bĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobasaj|hobasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hobĂŠsĂŠj|hobĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobasaj|hohobasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobĂŠsĂŠj|hohobĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒbasaj|nĂŒbasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒbĂŠsĂŠj|nĂŒbĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbasaj|nĂŒnĂŒbasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠsĂŠj|nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻbasaj|nĂŻbasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻbĂŠsĂŠj|nĂŻbĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbasaj|nĂŻnĂŻbasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠsĂŠj|nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubasaj|lubasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lubĂŠsĂŠj|lubĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubasaj|lulubasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubĂŠsĂŠj|lulubĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libasaj|libasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:libĂŠsĂŠj|libĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibasaj|lilibasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibĂŠsĂŠj|lilibĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobasaj|kobasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kobĂŠsĂŠj|kobĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobasaj|kokobasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobĂŠsĂŠj|kokobĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebasaj|kebasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kebĂŠsĂŠj|kebĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebasaj|kekebasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebĂŠsĂŠj|kekebĂŠsĂŠj]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
